prestazioni: Upgrade the **D20DTR** 2.0L turbo-diesel engine with a **Garrett GTB2260VK** turbocharger (hybridized for 2.2 bar boost) paired with a **Pierburg CWA 100** high-flow water pump and **Mahle Motorsport** forged pistons (8.5:1 compression) to handle 350+ hp safely. Reinforce the stock **Getrag MPS6** transmission with a **ZF Sachs SMG clutch kit** and **South Bend Stage 3 daily clutch disc** for durability under increased torque.

Replace the stock **Bosch CP4.2** fuel pump with a **Denso HP4** high-pressure fuel pump (2000 bar capable) and integrate a **Syvecs S6Plus** standalone ECU with **Motec PDM15** power distribution module for precise fueling and ignition control. Add a **Mishimoto MMINT-RXTN-17** front-mount intercooler with **TurboSmart Race Port 40mm** blow-off valve to eliminate heat soak and compressor surge.

Install a **Milltek Sport 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust system** (T304 stainless steel, 100-cell **HJS** catalytic converter) with **Scorpion** downpipe and **Akrapovič** titanium exhaust tips. Pair with a **K&N Typhoon** cold air intake (part #69-3544TTK) and **NGK Laser Iridium IX** spark plugs (gapped at 0.4mm) for optimized combustion efficiency.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody kit (Rexton W-specific, carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with **Seibon Carbon** hood (vented, 30% weight reduction). Lower the chassis with **KW Suspensions Variant 5** coilovers (adjustable damping, 40mm drop) and add **H&R TRAK+** wheel spacers (25mm front, 30mm rear) for aggressive stance.

Install **OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT** 20x9.5 ET35 wheels (matte bronze finish) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (265/40 R20 front, 285/35 R20 rear). Add **AP Racing Radi-CAL** 6-piston front brake calipers (380mm **DBA 5000 Series** rotors) and **Brembo** 4-piston rear calipers (345mm rotors) with **Ferodo DS2500** pads for track-ready stopping power.

Apply a **3M 1080 Gloss Black** full vinyl wrap with **Avery Dennison Supreme Wrapping Film** matte accents (roof, mirror caps, and lower body cladding). Add **Anzo USA** LED headlights (projector-style, 6000K) and **Morimoto XB LED** fog lights, paired with a **Seibon Carbon** rear spoiler (duckbill design, 3-piece adjustable angle) for aerodynamic balance.
